title: 'A feeling of bitter betrayal' - Gulf States' fears grow over Iran war fallout
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 21:22Modified: 03/03/2026 - 21:26
summary: "There is possibly a feeling of bitter betrayal" among Gulf countries over the Iranian response to the attacks, according to journalist Hoda Abdel-Hamid, who is reporting for FRANCE 24 in Doha.
